dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped 'momentum indicator (price > SMA)' to close > sma_20 using the 20-period momentum lookback. Mapped 'relative strength rank in top 30th percentile' to price_pos_20 >= 0.30 (price position indicator approximates relative strength ranking). Exit on momentum turn uses close < sma_20 crossover. Exit on RS falling below 40th percentile uses price_pos_20 < 0.40. Hold period set to 63 days (approximately 3 months). Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT but source emphasizes uptrends, so direction set to LONG with TRENDING_UP regime.

source_rule_text: A trader should use momentum and relative strength indicators to identify and trade persistent trends in stocks and sectors, because these signals have statistically significant predictive power over medium-term horizons.
